title: pelargonium × concolor
intro: Pelargonium × concolor, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, regulating menstrual cycles, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes. The herbal preparations of Rose Geranium typically involve distillation of the leaves to produce an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
